title: FortPerf
description: Performance ModPack For Low End Pc/Laptops
body:
# The Ultimate Performance Pack: Smooth & Stable

Tired of frame drops and stuttering ruining your builds? This modpack is meticulously crafted to transform your Minecraft experience from "playable" to silky smooth. By replacing the aging vanilla rendering engine with cutting-edge optimizations, we’ve ensured that even lower-end hardware can enjoy high-fidelity gameplay without the heat.

---

### 🚀 Key Performance Powerhouses

We’ve hand-picked the "gold standard" of optimization mods to ensure every aspect of the game engine—from lighting to logic—runs at peak efficiency.

* Sodium: A complete overhaul of the rendering engine; significantly boosts FPS and reduces stutter.
* Lithium: Optimizes game physics, mob AI, and block ticking without changing vanilla mechanics.
* FerriteCore: Drastically reduces the RAM usage of the game, preventing "Out of Memory" crashes.
* Starlight: Rewrites the light engine to be incredibly fast, fixing those annoying "lighting lag" spikes.
* Indium: An addon for Sodium that allows other mods to use its high-speed rendering features.

---

### 🛠️ Why Choose This Pack?

* Higher FPS: Experience 2x to 5x frame rate improvements depending on your hardware.
* Faster Loading: Get from the launcher to your world in record time.
* Better Thermals: Less strain on your CPU and GPU means a quieter, cooler PC.
* Vanilla Friendly: No gameplay changes—just the Minecraft you love, running better than ever.

---

### 💻 System Requirements

Since this pack is built for speed, it runs on almost anything. Whether you’re on a high-end gaming rig or a vintage laptop, you'll see a noticeable difference. 

Note: To get the most out of these mods, we recommend allocating at least 2GB to 4GB of RAM in your launcher settings.
